channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Small gardens plants, 18th March
item.description:
Small gardens plants dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped scooter, 18th March
item.description:
The scooter has been dumped at the gable end of Sidlaw house on Stamford Hill estate. The number plate has been removed which suggests it has been used for nefarious reasons.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Portland Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crate and table dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Crate and table abandoned beside litter bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calton Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag dumped’, 18th March

Black bag dumped close to finger post

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Knocked over sign and pole, 17th March
item.description:
Knocked over no entry sign and pole on Mepham Street, Waterloo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mepham Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of domestic rubbish sacks and large cardboard boxes dumped on street, 17th March
item.description:
Rubbish sacks broken open and large cardboard boxes left on pavement and road in Pope St, opposite 1-4 Pope St. This has been here for a couple of weeks at least. The bags are being broken open. The piles of rubbish are in two different places.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pope Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small paving stones are loose outside Bridgewalk Heights, 17th March
item.description:
Small paving stones are loose

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weston Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on road near north west corner, 17th March
item.description:
Broken glass shards on road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Thames Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Helium gas canister, 17th March
item.description:
A helium canister has been left on side of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tennyson Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow box and camera request, 17th March
item.description:
When events are held at London Stadium visitors park in the Westfield car parks. Junction of Waterden Road and Marshgate Lane becomes completely blocked. This is more of a problem after events finish. Request: Yellow box junction with camera please
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of commercial bin bags on the street, 17th March
item.description:
For months, commercial businesses are leaving their rubbish on the street near the public bin and in the old telephone box, not in the commercial waste units provided. It’s always overflowing and is truly unpleasant for all the residents on this road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large white catering van parked outside / untaxed and clamped, 17th March
item.description:
Large van has been stationary for approx 5 months? Clamped in last 4 weeks but nothing is happening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Jasper Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hawley Road, 17th March
item.description:
Terrible pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
